title: Building a Coding Agent in Swift, Part 1: The Agent Loop
description: The agent loop that drives everything — how a single stopReason check turns an API client into an autonomous agent.

queries.x: ("coding agent" OR "agent loop" OR "AI agents" OR agentic) lang:en
queries.linkedin: coding agent agent loop AI agents agentic

focus: Ivan Magda's hands-on tutorial series on building a coding agent FROM SCRATCH in Swift — the hand-rolled agent loop, tool dispatch, subagents, and context compaction, with no agent framework. The ideal post author is a Swift/iOS developer building, debugging, or discussing their own coding agent or the mechanics of an agent loop.
notSubject: using off-the-shelf agent frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGPT, LlamaIndex, LangGraph)
generic 'AI agents will change everything' hype or thought-leadership
crypto / web3 AI-agent tokens, launches, or trading bots
